---
engine: markdown
title: "__TITLE__"
description: "A short description of the figure."
date: "__DATE__"
image: images/featured-light.png
image-alt: "A description of the featured image."
categories: [__YEAR__]
---

```{typst}
//| include: false
//| file: _plot.typ
//| output-filename: featured.png
//| format: png
//| dpi: 300
//| width: 18cm
//| height: 9.45cm
```

```{typst}
//| label: fig-__SLUG__
//| echo: true
//| code-fold: true
//| code-summary: "See the code that generated this plot."
//| file: _plot.typ
//| output-filename: plot.svg
//| width: 18cm
//| height: 9.45cm
//| fig-alt: "{{< meta image-alt >}}"
//| fig-cap: "__TITLE__"
```

Data: [TidyTuesday __DATE__](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/tree/main/data/__YEAR__/__DATE__).

Write a sentence or two about what the figure shows.
